non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: The reporting owner disposed 5737.0 shares of Common Stock at $22.79 (Code S). [Note 1: The shares were sold in multiple trades pursuant to a 10b5-1 plan at prices ranging from $22.50 to $23.10. The price reported above reflects the weighted average sales price. The reporting person hereby undertakes to provide upon request to the SEC staff, the issuer or a security holder of the issuer full information regarding the number of shares and prices at which the transaction was effected.]
